caption:
Jumping off dual‑texture holds to a two‑hand dyno takes huge commitment 👊 The glassy, slippery surface makes every move feel like you’re leaping off a window pane — but that’s what makes it so fun 😅.

Repping @lasportivagram shoes, rocking @rafikiclimbing shorts, @underarmour #HeatGear top and my trusty @mammut chalkbag at @hudyboulder.karlin. Trying to stay calm and commit to the jump on this tricky problem!

#bouldering #climbing #indoorclimbing #rockclimbing #dyno #boulderproblem #climbinginspiration #climbersofinstagram #sendit #gymclimbing #chalkbag #dualtexture #commitment #training #athlete #fitlife #czechclimbing #climbinglife #boulderinglife #sportclimbing

🧗‍♂️ Run‑kick‑stick on this dynamic slab at @hudyboulder.karlin 🏃💥 Gear: @lasportiva Ondra Comp shoes, @rafiki_climbing shorts, @underarmour HeatGear 🦶😎 #bouldering #climbing #dyno #runandjump #coordination #climbinglife #sendit #sportclimbing #training #dynamic #fitness #prague

Triple pogo to the moon 🌙—bare right foot, 1 shoe only 🦶👟⚡️ At @v16cka.
Shoes: @lasportivagram Mantra • Shorts: @rafikiclimbing
